name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗Fendi's latest medium Simply model, exuding a high-end sense of relaxation. Soft calfskin material feels incredibly delicate. Zipper design gives you your own private space. The adjustable shoulder strap is amazing. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand. A versatile bag that adapts to your needs. So cool!
348
Size 34.5x4.5x20cm
